files: lib/theme/ or lib/core/ money formatter (formatNaira/formatMoney helper)
tasks.change: Money is integer kobo end-to-end (local drift DB + wire). Update the shared money formatter to divide by 100 for display, and ensure the drift migration stores kobo. Amount INPUT fields (record-debt, record-payment, edit-debt) must multiply user-entered naira by 100 before persisting. Single formatter change + call-site audit; individual screens keep their layout.
tasks.resolution: Money converted kobo<->naira at the frontend sync/API boundary (Phase 6), keeping local drift + UI money code unchanged. No UI formatter change needed. Decided 2026-07-12.

tasks.change: Remove the granular per-permission toggle matrix (Record debts/Record payments/Send reminders/View reports/Manage customers) and kStaffPerms state. Backend implements coarse owner|staff only; the screen shows role + activate/deactivate, no per-permission toggles. Preserve the deactivate flow.

Rename the reminder-tone third value 'Firm' -> 'Final' in both _tones literals (label + any persisted value), per C-1 ruling. Canonical tones become gentle|friendly|final. Preserve the sample-message copy and card styling.

notes: S-2 (UUIDv7) is wireVisible:false — ids are not displayed; the client mints them in the data layer during wiring. No UI-align task.
S-3 (canonical plan ids) is ALREADY aligned in frontend commit f476925 (billing.dart writes canonical ids, fail-closed to starter). No UI-align task — confirmed by handoff §2.

C-1 (reminderTone third value): IF resolved to 'final', a UA-3 task will be appended to rename 'Firm'->'Final' in setup_screen.dart _tones (~36-49), templates_screen.dart _tones (~13-26), and any tone display label. Pending user ruling.
